etymology.description: 忄 is a variant of 心 (心) (xīn, "heart") used as a radical on the left side of characters.
etymology.interpretation: 忄 represents a stylized form of 心 (心) (xīn, "heart"), which is used to indicate connotations related to emotions or the mind when it functions as a semantic component in compound characters.

examples.chinese: 她的心情很好(她的心情很好)。
我对他心怀感激(我對他心懷感激)。
examples.english: I am deeply grateful to him.

examples.chinese: 听到这个消息(聽到這個消息)，他心里很难过(他心裡很難過)。
examples.pinyin: Tīngdào zhège xiāoxī, tā xīnli hěn nánguò.
examples.english: Hearing the news, he felt very sad.
